paperTitle: ADPro: a Test-time Adaptive Diffusion Policy via Manifold-constrained Denoising and Task-aware Initialization for Robotic Manipulation
organization: École Centrale de Lyon / Dalian University of Technology

benchmarks.label: CALVIN
benchmarks.detail: Suites: 1 task 94.7 · 2 tasks 83 · 3 tasks 73.6 · 4 tasks 61.4 · 5 tasks 51.1 | Table II | Notes: ABC->D zero-shot evaluation, 3 seeds. Test-time adaptation on 3D Diffuser Actor. 25% fewer inference steps.

benchmarks.label: RLBench
benchmarks.detail: Tasks: open drawer 93.1 · slide block 100 · sweep to dustpan 97 · put in safe 98.5 · turn tap 99.5 · put in drawer 95.2 · place wine 94 · stack cups 56.5 · sort shape 50 · insert peg 74.5 · drag stick 100 · place cups 25.4 · close jar 96.2 · meat off grill 95.6 · stack blocks 67.3 · push buttons 98.6 · screw bulb 83.1 · put in cupboard 85.9 | Table I | Notes: 18-task PerAct subset evaluation, 3 random seeds averaged. Test-time adaptation on 3D Diffuser Actor. 100 demos/task training.
